heading: Conditions on rent increases in projects receiving assistance under other provisions of law
label: 1490j Conditions on rent increases in projects receiving assistance under other provisions of law
text: The Secretary may not approve any increase in rental payments, with respect to units in which the tenants are paying rentals in excess of 30 per centum of their incomes, in any project which is assisted under section 1484, 1485, or 1487 of this title and under unless the project owner is receiving, or has applied for (within the most recent period of 180 days prior to the effective date of such increase), assistance payments with respect to such project under section 1490a(a)(2)(A) or 1490a(a)(5) of this title or .section 1490a(a)(1)(B) of this titlesection 1437f of this title
notes: Amendments1998— substituted “assistance payments with respect to such project under section 1490a(a)(2)(A) or 1490a(a)(5) of this title” for “rental assistance payments with respect to such project under ”.Pub. L. 105–276section 1490a(a)(2)(A) of this title1983— substituted “30 per centum” for “25 per centum”.Pub. L. 98–181

Effective Date of 1983 AmendmentAmendment by effective six months after , or upon the earlier promulgation of implementing regulations, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 98–181section 517(f) of Pub. L. 98–181section 1490a of this titleNov. 30, 1983
